responses.processing: I'm processing your request. As your AI Copilot, I can help you manage products, generate creative assets, and optimize your store.

responses.wordwall_info: To sync with Wordwall, go to the Products page and use the 'Interactive Import' button. I can also help you scrape metadata from any educational URL!

Parfait pour les leçons en ligne et en présentiel !
